title: Realistic hearts
description: Realistic hearts - replaces the health indicator with realistic hearts
body:
![this is what it looks like in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44f49697ed1a69f8a0d78ae1acf3d08058afe7d6.png)
please give feedback or advice on the discord channel

The resource pack replaces the health indicator with realistic hearts.

the 1.20.1 file should work with everything that came before 1.20.1.

starting from 1.20.2 you need file 1.20.2, it should work
